name: No witnesses to forklift hitting me at work how to prove it?
description: Med records, videos, reports; on-site presumption helps.[3]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to forklift hitting me at work how to prove it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Med records, videos, reports; on-site presumption helps.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Use medical records, employer logs, security video, and your testimony; presumption for on-premises injuries.** Utah shifts burden to employer.[3] Key factors: Report immediately, get scene photos, maintenance records for defects.[1] Circumstantial evidence like position of forklift suffices often.
